title: Altinity SQL Browser Dashboard document v1
description: One explicit Dashboard aggregate: tile instances, semantic tile order, layout, filter definitions, and persistence revision. Runtime values and result caches are never persisted here. Unknown future documentVersion values fail closed.

documentVersion.title: Dashboard document version
documentVersion.description: Dashboard document contract version; always 1 for this contract.

description.title: Dashboard description
description.description: Optional authoring note shown with the Dashboard.

revision.title: Persistence revision
revision.description: Incremented once for each successfully committed Dashboard document mutation. Validation, preview, and export never increment it. Starts at 1.

filters.title: Filter definitions
filters.description: Dashboard filter definitions in filter order. Required even when empty.

tiles.title: Tiles
tiles.description: Tile instances in canonical semantic order: execution planning, DOM and keyboard traversal, fallback rendering, print/export, and serialization all follow this order. Required even when empty.

dashboardTilePresentationV1.title: Tile presentation selection
dashboardTilePresentationV1.description: Selected reusable variant and optional small tile-local override patch, both resolved over the saved query's base panel.

variant.title: Selected variant
variant.description: Name of a variant declared on the tile's saved query. A persisted name that no longer exists fails validation; there is no silent fallback.

dashboardTileV1.title: Dashboard tile
dashboardTileV1.description: One query instance placed on this Dashboard: stable instance identity, query reference, selected presentation, and optional local title/description. Actual placement and size live in the layout document.

id.title: Tile identifier
id.description: Stable tile instance identity within this Dashboard.

queryId.title: Saved-query reference
queryId.description: ID of the saved query this tile renders. The query must exist and have Dashboard role panel.

dashboardFilterDefinitionV1.title: Dashboard filter definition
dashboardFilterDefinitionV1.description: One Dashboard filter: the targeted parameter name, an optional filter-role source query providing options, and optional explicit target tiles. Runtime filter values are never persisted here.

id.title: Filter identifier
id.description: Stable filter identity within this Dashboard.

parameter.title: Parameter name
parameter.description: ClickHouse query parameter name this filter supplies. Target queries must declare the parameter with compatible types.

sourceQueryId.title: Option source query
sourceQueryId.description: ID of a filter-role saved query whose result provides the option list. The source query never creates a tile.

targets.title: Target tiles
targets.description: Tile IDs this filter applies to. Absent means every compatible panel tile.

defaultValue.title: Default value
defaultValue.description: Optional default parameter value; any JSON value.

dashboardLayoutFallbackV1.title: Layout fallback
dashboardLayoutFallbackV1.description: A complete valid flow@1 layout rendered when the primary layout engine cannot load. Fallback placement keys resolve against the same dashboard.tiles.

dashboardLayoutDocumentV1.title: Dashboard layout document
dashboardLayoutDocumentV1.description: Versioned, engine-specific placement document. An unsupported type/version must carry a valid flow@1 fallback or the Dashboard fails before execution.

config.title: Engine configuration
config.description: Open engine-specific configuration object; recursively key-sorted by the canonical encoder.

items.title: Placement entries
items.description: Engine-specific placement objects keyed by tile ID. Every key must reference an existing tile and the entry count must not exceed the tile count.
